stories.headline: Four central banks — Fed, ECB, BoJ, BoE — all set rates this week as crypto holds $2.71T
stories.tldr: Bank of Japan, Federal Reserve, ECB and Bank of England each deliver policy decisions this week, the densest macro window of 2026 so far.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Synchronized rate signals will reset the dollar trade that has moved in near-perfect opposition to BTC for nearly four years, dictating whether the $79K wall finally breaks.
the_details: Crypto market cap sits at $2.71T, up 1.7% in 24 hours, with $66.6B in trading volume.
Q1 GDP and March PCE inflation print alongside Visa, Mastercard, Robinhood and Galaxy earnings.
BTC-dollar inverse correlation is at its most extreme reading in almost four years per CoinDesk.

stories.headline: Spot Solana ETF inflows crater 92% to $34M as institutional risk appetite cools
stories.tldr: Spot SOL ETF net inflows fell from $419M in November 2025 to just $34M in April 2026, a 92% collapse signaling weakening institutional demand.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Solana was supposed to be the next ETF growth story after BTC and ETH, but the flow drought caps near-term price upside and undercuts the L1 rotation thesis.
the_details: SOL trades near $86.47 with a $49.8B market cap, ranking seventh.
Solana Fear & Greed Index sits at 33, deeper into Fear than the broader market's 47.
Firedancer is still targeting 1M TPS in 2026; Alpenglow has cut finality below 200ms.

stories.headline: SEC staff says crypto UI providers can skip broker-dealer registration under new conditions
stories.tldr: The SEC's Trading and Markets division issued guidance on April 13 telling Covered User Interface Providers they will not face enforcement absent broker-dealer registration if conditions are met.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: This is the first explicit safe harbor for front-end aggregators and DEX UIs — directly de-risking products like Uniswap interface, 1inch and Jupiter under U.S. law.
the_details: Joint SEC-CFTC March 17 release classifies BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP and LINK as digital commodities.
FDIC, Treasury and FinCEN/OFAC GENIUS Act stablecoin rules are out for comment through June 2-9.
SEC Chair Atkins has shifted the agency from 'enforcement heavy' to 'rulemaking mode' at his one-year mark.

stories.headline: Aave plants $14.7B TVL flag on Solana via Sunrise DeFi as cross-chain liquidity war heats up
stories.tldr: Aave's deployment to Solana through Sunrise DeFi routes Ethereum-backed liquidity into SVM execution, layering on top of Solana's existing $5.6B DeFi base.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: This tests whether Solana speed actually drives net-new lending demand or just siphons Ethereum liquidity — the answer will set the template for every L1 expansion.
the_details: Ethereum still anchors over $12B of Aave's $14.7B total TVL.
Aave saw $8.4B in deposits leave in 48 hours after the April KelpDAO and Drift exploits.
Solana DeFi TVL stands near $5.6B, the largest non-EVM DeFi base.

stories.headline: The Block names Steve Chung CEO alongside $10M Foresight Ventures raise
stories.tldr: Crypto media outlet The Block appointed veteran media operator Steve Chung as CEO with a fresh $10M check from Foresight Ventures.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Crypto media has been bleeding for years; a fresh raise plus an outside CEO signals the data-and-research playbook is the model investors will fund next cycle.
the_details: Larry Cermak shifts to President, focused on research and product.
Foresight Ventures is leading the round, doubling down on info infrastructure.
TOKEN2049 Dubai was just pushed to 2027 amid heightened UAE security risks.
